Welcome

Legacy Optometrist

Legacy Optometrist has been serving Richmond and the surrounding region with premium optometrist services built on a foundation of integrity, craftsmanship, and an unwavering commitment to excellence. Our team brings decades of combined experience to every project, ensuring results that stand the test of time.

Why Choose Us

Why Richmond Trusts Legacy Optometrist

  • ✦ Quality Craftsmanship
  • ✦ Specialized Knowledge
  • ✦ Comprehensive Services
  • ✦ Proven Track Record
  • ✦ Family-Owned Commitment
Work With Us →
Affiliations & Certifications
What We Do

Our Services

Comprehensive Eye Exams

Our 60-minute comprehensive exams go beyond standard vision testing to evaluate how living in Richmond affects your eye ...

Dry Eye Treatment

Richmond's combination of high humidity and airborne allergens creates perfect conditions for chronic dry eye. Our speci...

Contact Lens Fitting

Finding comfortable contact lenses in Richmond requires understanding our unique environment. We specialize in fitting l...

Pediatric Eye Care

From newborns to college applicants, we provide age-appropriate eye care that meets Virginia's specific needs. Our pedia...

Emergency Eye Care

When eye emergencies strike in Richmond, we provide same-day care for: - Construction debris injuries common in Scott's...

Contact Us →
“
After years of struggling with irritated eyes every spring, Dr. Martinez diagnosed my meibomian gland dysfunction. The LipiScan showed exactly what was wrong, and their customized treatment plan got me through pollen season without constantly rubbing my eyes. Even advised me on home humidifier settings for my Church Hill row house.
— Marcus T.
